description: Canonical extraction schema for transforming Phase A source corpus into Phase B (40.2) structured intake. Derived from BlueEdge v3.23.0 instantiation.

EvidenceDomain.description: A top-level grouping of evidence files sharing a common source directory and provenance.

path.description: Canonical source path (inner path after packaging normalization)

SubTable.description: A typed grouping of files within an EvidenceDomain, reflecting architectural sub-units.

label.description: Architectural role label (e.g., Infrastructure Artifacts, Domain Modules)

FileRow.description: A single evidence file or pattern row within a sub-table.

name_or_pattern.description: Literal filename or {placeholder} pattern for repeated structures

is_pattern.description: True if this row represents N instances of a structural pattern

instance_count.description: Number of instances when is_pattern = true

CanonicalEvidenceUnit.description: A CEU — the normalized, canonical representation of one logical evidence source. Stable identifier shared across all 40.2 artifacts.

scope.description: File count, technology, and role summary for large CEUs

CEUSubUnit.description: A typed functional grouping within a large CEU (R-ABS-02 pattern).

OverlapDeclaration.description: An OVL record declaring structural similarity between two CEUs, with canonical preference assignment.

canonical_for_isolated_evidence.description: CEU-ID preferred for module-level code evidence

UnknownSpace.description: A US record declaring an explicit epistemological gap — a position where information is absent and must not be inferred.

ClassificationRecord.description: A single evidence unit's class assignment in the evidence_classification_map.

evidence_unit.description: File name, path pattern, or CEU reference

ValidationCheck.description: A single validation check in the intake_validation_log.

PathNormalizationRecord.description: A documented path duplication classification and collapse decision.

evidence_citation.description: Phase A files supporting the classification

rule_types.R-GRP: Grouping — assembles multiple evidence items into a named domain or sub-group
rule_types.R-FLT: Filtering — controls intake_status assignment and exclusion from primary evidence
rule_types.R-NRM: Normalization — resolves structural ambiguity (duplicate paths, overlaps, unknown-space)
rule_types.R-ABS: Abstraction — collapses collections or patterns into canonical named units
rule_types.R-NAM: Naming — assigns stable, systematic identifiers to CEUs and sub-units

rule_execution_order: R-NRM-01 — Path normalization must precede all other rules to ensure canonical paths are used
R-FLT-01 — Provenance filtering before domain grouping
R-FLT-03 — Exclusion list filtering before any content analysis
R-GRP-01 — Top-level domain grouping after filtering
R-ABS-01 — CEU abstraction after domain grouping
R-NRM-02 — Overlap declaration after CEU identification
R-NRM-03 — Unknown-space preservation after overlap declaration
R-NAM-01 — CEU ID assignment after all units defined
R-NAM-02 — Sub-unit ID assignment after parent CEU IDs confirmed

states.ACCEPTED: Full primary evidence — used for all downstream analysis
states.ACCEPTED-SUPPORT-ONLY: Extraction metadata — used for context only; not primary evidence authority
states.EXISTENCE CONFIRMED - NOT INGESTED: Provenance archives — existence recorded; content not ingested
states.NOT INGESTED: Same as above in CEU format
states.EXCLUDED: Prior analytical outputs — explicitly not in scope per evidence_boundary.md
